query:
-- First update scenarios that reference duplicate module IDs to point to the canonical ones
-- M4 scenarios already point to 19, M5 to 24 — those are correct
-- Delete all duplicate module entries (keep IDs 1, 2, 3, 19, 24)
DELETE FROM modules WHERE id NOT IN (1, 2, 3, 19, 24);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user M2p26uMeyZfN57L.7f2cda2e67ce --database S5Kvdsbv47gJwCwLVS8V8T --execute 
-- First update scenarios that reference duplicate module IDs to point to the canonical ones
-- M4 scenarios already point to 19, M5 to 24 — those are correct
-- Delete all duplicate module entries (keep IDs 1, 2, 3, 19, 24)
